creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Please attach the following information to the PR, as noted in the build
output:

Please report the problem to ports@christianserving.org [maintainer] and
attach the
"/usr/ports/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/zabbix-server/work/zabbix-1.8.2/config.log"
including the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might
be a good idea to provide an overview of all packages installed on your
system (e.g. an `ls /var/db/pkg`).

Thank you,
Greg Larkin
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/           - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/     - Ready. Set. Code.
http://twitter.com/sourcehosting/ - Follow me, follow you
